name: @zenbu/view-theme
description: Tailwind v4 @theme mapping that wires shadcn-style utility classes (bg-card, text-muted-foreground, border, rounded-md, …) onto the host design tokens that zenbu auto-injects into every plugin view. Plugins import this after `@import "tailwindcss"` and immediately match the host's theme — including live updates when the host toggles dark mode.
